decisions.description: Checks if medical center is Ashdod Public Ashdod Public has different templates
decisions.name: Ashdod_Pub
decisions.label: Ashdod Public?

decisions.description: Checks if the medical Aid was not cancelled

decisions.description: Checks if the medical Aid was not cancelled

decisions.description: Checks if Patient Email is populated, if not redirect to a path to update from patient's account object
decisions.name: Patient_Email_is_Populated
decisions.label: Patient Email is Populated?

Flow.description:
On creation/update of a new record of the Medical_Aid_Appointment object
- Update "manager of site" and "מייל רכז מוגבלויות" fields - set a 7 day reminder for site manager - Populate Account Email (if null) - Check Type of Assist - Send email to 3 "Another Business Factor" (fields from Site_c) when Medical Aid equals Translator
AM: 03032025- USER STORY 19985- add Auto_Launch_Update_Medical_Aid_Appointment_Indecation_On_Appointment subflow

formulas.description: a formula that creates a link from the ID created on new record
formulas.name: RecordLink

Flow.label: Medical Aid Process - RT

value.stringValue: Flow: Medical Aid Process - RT (appointment not cancelled)
Flow: Medical Aid Process - RT (appoint not cancelled Ashdod)

value.stringValue: Flow: Medical Aid Process - RT (appoint not cancelled Ashdod business factor)
